queries.description: Implementing an entity in multiple source locations violates the one-definition rule and leads to undefined behavior.
queries.name: The source code used to implement an entity shall appear only once

queries.description: Template specializations must be defined in the same file as the primary template or where a specialized type is defined to ensure visibility and avoid ODR violations.
queries.name: RULE-6-2-3: Template specializations in wrong location

RULE-6-2-3.title: The source code used to implement an entity shall appear only once
